ksa_text: Knowledge of data serialization formats and their trade-offs for different workloads, including JSON, Apache Avro, Apache Parquet, and Protocol Buffers, with understanding of schema evolution, compression characteristics, and query performance implications.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of how different file types can be used for anomalous behavior.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of how different file types can be used for anomalous behavior.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Technical Foundations KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.39) to justify inclusion for the Director of Data Governance. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Director of Data Governance roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Technical Foundations is not a standard competency expectation for Director of Data Governance. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of Data Governance competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.39) and edge-domain placement (Technical Foundations) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of Data Governance. All passes support exclusion.
